title: Group by based on a Dropdown or Tag

posts.author: BdtFR (BRUNO DEBAT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
My use case is this one: I want like to link an item to multiple customers, so I could use a dropdown with the list of customers, or a tag with also the list of customers.
The idea is to be able to display a table group by customer, and also a Kanban view by customer.
Group by seems limited to label, and label is limited to a single value.
How can I solve this issue?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bruno,

At this stage, the dropdown isn’t supported in the group-by feature, I am sorry for the setback

That said, I am interested if you might already have a pre-existing contacts board that you could instead connect to your current board, to link to those items? This will allow you to connect multiple contacts to those items, and also group-by the connect boards column…

Let me know how this sounds!

posts.author: BdtFR (BRUNO DEBAT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Bianca for your suggested solution.
I’ve just tried but I can’t Group By on a Mirror column

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this is correct - whilst you can group by the connect boards column it isn’t currently possible to group by the mirror column. Sorry for the inconvenience Bruno - I will share this feedback internally!

posts.author: BdtFR (BRUNO DEBAT)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately the Group By on the Connect Boards column (item title) doesn’t work, please try to do it and let me know

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for getting back to me Bruno… I did some digging and this function only works when configured with max 1 link per item… does this help explain why you might be encountering an issue? If not, can you please share a screenshot with me?

posts.author: BdtFR (BRUNO DEBAT)
posts.cookedHtml: Many thanks Bianca this is perfect​:ok_hand: : with the 1 link per item I could now filter on the Connect Boards column

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: So happy to hear you got this sorted Bruno!
